articles.title: Seeing keratoconus earlier with light polarization and AI
articles.description: Keratoconus is a progressive eye disease that weakens and thins the cornea, the clear front surface of the eye. In its early, subclinical stage, the cornea can still appear normal on routine exams. Yet this is when accurate diagnosis matters most, especially when patients are being evaluated for refractive surgery.

articles.title: High-intensity interval training shows strongest vascular benefits in cardiovascular patients
articles.description: Endothelial dysfunction is a hallmark of cardiovascular disease (CVD) and plays a central role in vascular inflammation, thrombosis, and impaired vasodilation. A study led by researchers from Miguel Hernández University of Elche (UMH) and the Alicante Institute for Health and Biomedical Research (ISABIAL) identifies high-intensity interval exercise (HIIE) as the most robust and evidence-based strategy to improve endothelial function in patients with CVD.

articles.title: Flaws in Kenya’s AI-driven health reforms driving up costs for the poorest
articles.description:
Exclusive: amid unrest, President William Ruto promised to give all Kenyans access to healthcare. But the algorithm favours the rich, an investigation has found


 An AI system used to predict how much Kenyans can afford to pay for access to healthcare, has systemically driven up costs for the poor, an investigation has found.
The healthcare system being rolled out across the country, a key electoral promise of President William Ruto, was launched in October 2024 and intended to replace Kenya’s decades-old national insurance system.
 Continue reading...

articles.description: A former Ironman triathlete says his eye problems led to a shocking stage 4 lung cancer diagnosis, but a series of targeted drugs has helped him beat the odds.

articles.title: Seeing keratoconus earlier with light polarization and AI
articles.description: Keratoconus is a progressive eye disease that weakens and thins the cornea, the clear front surface of the eye. In its early, subclinical stage, the cornea can still appear normal on routine exams. Yet this is when accurate diagnosis matters most, especially when patients are being evaluated for refractive surgery.

articles.description: President Trump's Middle East trip helped position the U.S. at the center of a massive global energy reset with Saudi Arabia, Qatar and the UAE.

articles.title: Warsh's take on Fed independence is met with confusion and some concern
articles.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is putting his own spin on the independence of monetary policy. Many former Fed officials aren't sold.

articles.title: Dhemaji constituency assembly elections 2026: BJP's Ranoj Pegu wins by margin of over 32,000 votes
Kerala Assembly poll results: UDF’s Sandeep Varier reclaims Thrikkarippur seat after six decades
articles.description: Varier maintained a clear lead from the initial rounds of counting and steadily widened the margin through successive rounds, signalling a strong anti-incumbency wave

articles.title: US Stock Futures Dip on Reports of Increasing Mideast Tension
articles.description: US stock futures saw volatile early Monday trading with news reports of Iranian missiles hitting a US Navy ship. While those reports cited IRGC-aligned Fars News Agency, a senior US official said that a ship was not hit by Iranian missiles, according to Axios, which helped futures erase some of the earlier losses.

dailyNews.description: Jaylen Brown claimed on Sunday that NBA refs had an "agenda" to call fouls on him as the Boston Celtics lost their playoff series to the Philadelphia 76ers in seven games.

dailyNews.title: Trump Announces ‘Humanitarian’ Plan to Get Ships Through Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said the US will help ships stranded in the Persian Gulf transit the Strait of Hormuz, describing it as a “humanitarian gesture” and testing his ability to restore traffic through the strategic waterway for the first time since the war with Iran began.

dailyNews.title: European Stocks Fall as Carmakers Drop on Trump Tariff Threat
dailyNews.description: European stocks slipped in early trading, led lower by automakers after US President Donald Trump said he would raise tariffs on cars imported from the region.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: UKMTO reports attacks on 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said he ordered U.S. forces to guide ships and crews from countries that are not involved with the Iran war out of Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Rudy Giuliani, former New York mayor and Trump lawyer, hospitalized in critical condition
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump called Rudy Giuliani a "True Warrior, and the Best Mayor in the History of New York City, BY FAR," in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Iran blockade ‘going global’ is a warning signal to China and Russia
dailyNews.description: President Trump calls the Iran blockade unbelievably effective as U.S. forces seize ships carrying oil worth millions, sending a message to Russia and China.

dailyNews.title: Tuning out: Why many Americans are sick of the news – especially Trump news
dailyNews.description: About six in 10 Americans try to avoid news about Trump, a new poll finds, reflecting widespread news fatigue amid a flood of negative headlines.

dailyNews.title: China Seeks an Advantage With Both Trump and Iran as War Evolves
dailyNews.description: With President Trump’s visit to Beijing looming, China is pushing Iran to negotiate even as its companies export material that could be used by Iran’s military.

dailyNews.title: Rubio to Visit Rome, Officials Say, After Trump’s Feud With Pope and Meloni
dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio’s trip will come after President Trump criticized Pope Leo XIV and then turned on Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni for defending the pontiff.

dailyNews.title: Trump Backed Forced Treatment for Homeless People. Utah Shows the Challenges.
dailyNews.description: State lawmakers declined to back a Trump-inspired plan to move 1,300 homeless people to a campus on the edge of Salt Lake City, but supporters are trying to keep the plan’s spirit alive.

dailyNews.title: U.S. beginning effort to "guide" stranded ships out of Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump announced the U.S. would "guide" ships not involved in the war with Iran out of the Strait of Hormuz. A U.S.-led task force says it has started the operation.

dailyNews.title: 5/3: CBS Weekend News
dailyNews.description: Passengers deal with Spirit shutdown fallout; Trump's poll numbers tank as Iran war continues to jack up gas prices.

dailyNews.title: Trump's poll numbers tank as Iran war continues to jack up gas prices
dailyNews.description: Prolonged uncertainty about the war in Iran coupled with rising energy and grocery prices are pummeling pocketbooks and President Trump's polling numbers. Olivia Gazis reports.
